name: Allegiant Professional Business Services, Inc.
summary: Allegiant Professional Business Services, Inc. provides temporary staffing and professional employer organization services in the United States. The company offers human resource management tools and related financial service, including payroll and payroll taxes, employee benefits, workers' compensation coverage, workplace safety programs, compliance with federal and state employment laws, labor and workplace regulatory, and related administrative services. The company was formerly known as FocusViews, Inc. and changed its name to Allegiant Professional Business Services, Inc. in December 2007. Allegiant Professional Business Services, Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Marlton, New Jersey.
